project_type: Monorepo with 16 Next.js/non-Next.js apps and shared packages
verification_instructions: Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm build to verify all 109 typecheck and 87 build targets pass
environment_constraints: No running backends. API routes act as proxy stubs. Non-Next.js apps (quantsync, quantads, quantneon, quantube, quantmax, quantedits) use tsc --noEmit for build, so no Next.js API routes there.
contribution_requirements: No @ts-ignore or @ts-expect-error. typecheck and build must remain green.
key_patterns: Next.js App Router apps (quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet, quantai, quantmail, quantchat) have src/app/ directories. API routes go in src/app/api/. Non-Next.js apps have apiClient services that point to backend URLs directly. Some hooks in non-Next.js apps (quantsync, quantads) call /api/* relative paths via direct fetch().
directory_structure: apps/ contains 16 apps. 7 use Next.js App Router (have 'next build' script, src/app/ dir): quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet, quantai, quantmail, quantchat. 6 use tsc --noEmit build (src/pages/ dir, no Next.js): quantneon, quantube, quantmax, quantedits, quantsync, quantads. packages/ contains shared libs (auth, ai, common, database, realtime, server-core, shared-ui). services/ exists too.
